metadata.title: Run a Pre-Mortem on an Agentic Task with Claude
metadata.note: CLI video. Exclusions: formal agent red-teaming, AgentDojo benchmark walkthrough, full OWASP LLM Top 10.

skin_warnings: B00: palette=claude but the cold open is 'NikBearBrownOpen' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B09: palette=claude but the outro is 'NikBearBrownOutro' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Musinique. Musinique. Build it with a CLI, then take it apart.

props.command: Run a Pre-Mortem on an Agentic Task with Claude
props.segment: Run a Pre-Mortem on an Agentic Task with Claude

beats.role_note: the problem, context, stakes -- BEFORE the CLI opens
beats.narration_text: Eight failure modes, one task. The pre-mortem identifies the three live risks before the agent sends the first email. Irreversible action, prompt injection, fabricated completion -- all three are live in an email-drafting task. Naming them before the run determines what you supervise.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- title card: 8 FAILURE MODES. Name the live ones BEFORE the agent runs.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Eight failure modes, one task. The pre-mortem identifies the three live risks before the agent sends the first email. Irreversible action, prompt injection, fab

beats.narration_text: The indie musician who automates their Spotify stats check, their distributor ping, their playlist pitch — that musician gets time back that they would otherwise spend refreshing a dashboard. An agent is not a luxury for the label's data team; it is a tool you can run free, on your own machine, today. The same frontmatter that tells Claude when to fire a code-review agent tells it when to check your streaming anomalies. You just haven't pointed it yet.

artifactLines: The same tools the platforms use — pointed back at you.
Roll your own. Own the deck.

beats.narration_text: Ask Claude to run the eight-mode pre-mortem on the email-drafting task -- mark each mode live or not, and write a concrete prevention step for each live one.

props.command: claude "Run a pre-mortem on: 'Process 30 customer emails, extract complaints, draft a response for each, save to /drafts/.' For each of the eight failure modes [tool overreach, stale context, plausible summary, silent omission, prompt injection, fabricated completion, irreversible action, automation bias]: mark live or not-live, and for each live mode write one concrete prevention step."

beats.narration_text: The pre-mortem table printer formats each failure mode as a row: mode name, live or not, why, and the concrete prevention step.

props.code:
MODES = [
 ("tool overreach",        "not-live", "-",    "-"),
 ("stale context",         "not-live", "-",    "-"),
 ("plausible summary",     "live","may omit complaints","require count check"),
 ("silent omission",       "live","emails skipped silently","verify count"),
 ("prompt injection",      "live","email body can instruct","sanitize input"),
 ("fabricated completion", "live","may hallucinate draft","spot-check drafts"),
 ("irreversible action",   "live","drafts saved permanently","gate before save"),
 ("automation bias",       "live","reviewer trusts output","structured review"),
]
for m, live, why, prev in MODES:
    tag = "LIVE" if live=="live" else "ok"
    print(f"[{tag}] {m}: {why} | Prevention: {prev}")
props.title: premortem.py

beats.narration_text: Eight-row table prints. Prompt injection, irreversible action, fabricated completion all marked LIVE. Three modes that need concrete mitigations before the task runs.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- screen-recording: terminal showing eight-row pre-mortem table with 5 LIVE rows highlighted in red: prompt injection, fabricated completion, irreversible action, silent omission, automation bias

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Eight-row table prints. Prompt injection, irreversible action, fabricated completion all marked LIVE. Three modes that need concrete mitigations before the task

beats.narration_text: Change the task: instead of saving to a drafts folder, send the responses directly. How does irreversible action risk change?

props.command: claude "Revise the pre-mortem: replace 'save to /drafts/' with 'send responses directly.' How does the irreversible action risk change?"

beats.narration_text: Irreversible action escalated to HIGHEST RISK. Sending is the trigger -- once sent, no undo. The pre-mortem now requires a hard gate before the send step.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- screen-recording: revised pre-mortem table showing irreversible action row escalated to HIGHEST RISK with annotation: 'send' is the irreversibility trigger -- gate required

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Irreversible action escalated to HIGHEST RISK. Sending is the trigger -- once sent, no undo. The pre-mortem now requires a hard gate before the send step.

beats.narration_text: Failure modes cluster by task type. Naming them before the task determines what you supervise -- and which modes escalate when one word in the task description changes.
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- recap card: FAILURE MODES CLUSTER BY TASK TYPE. Name them before the task. Escalation follows the irreversible action.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Failure modes cluster by task type. Naming them before the task determines what you supervise -- and which modes escalate when one word in the task description

beats.narration_text: Before any task that reads external content or writes to external systems, run the eight-mode pre-mortem. Verify each live mode has a concrete prevention step -- not 'be careful.'
beats.visual_intent: SLATE -- next-steps card: Run the 8-mode pre-mortem. Each live mode needs a concrete prevention step, not 'be careful.'

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Before any task that reads external content or writes to external systems, run the eight-mode pre-mortem. Verify each live mode has a concrete prevention step -

beats.narration_text: Musinique. Build it with a CLI. Then take it apart. At Musinique, nikbearbrown dot com.
